description: A finding raised by only one reviewer (minority-of-one) in the correctness category. Stage 6 applies the standard demotion: severity is lowered one level from high to medium.

consolidated_findings.title: Off-by-one boundary error in discount calculation
consolidated_findings.description: The calculateDiscount function uses > instead of >= for the tier boundary comparison at line 34, causing customers at the exact tier threshold to receive the wrong discount tier.

notes.minority_of_one_detected: raised_by has exactly 1 entry → minority-of-one rule applies
notes.no_security_exemption: category=correctness (not security) → no exemption applies → demotion proceeds
notes.demotion_amount: one level down: high → medium (severity ranking: critical=4, high=3, medium=2, low=1)
notes.low_stays_low: If original severity were low, it remains low (cannot demote below low)
